member.office_address: 1013 Longworth House Office Building Washington DC 20515-4605

form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Office of Representative John McGuire (VA-05). Thank you for contacting the office of Representative John McGuire with a program or language request for FY2027 appropriations. Please submit a separate form for each request. Due the volume of requests that our office expects to receive, we will not prioritize meetings with your organization or the organization that you represent unless this request form is completed.

sections.description: Please provide the information for the primary point of contact submitting this request.

fields.label: Name
fields.help_text: Full name of the person submitting the request.

fields.label: Email
fields.help_text: Email address of the submitter.

sections.description: Details regarding the organization requesting funding or language changes.

fields.label: Organization
fields.help_text: Name of the requesting organization.

fields.label: Organization Contact Name
fields.help_text: Primary contact name within the organization.

fields.label: Organization�Contact Email
fields.help_text: Contact email for the organization.

fields.label: Organization�Contact Phone
fields.help_text: Contact phone number for the organization.

fields.label: Organization Address
fields.help_text: Mailing address of the organization.

fields.label: Organization Address (Virginia)
fields.help_text: Organization address if located in Virginia.

sections.description: General classification and description of the request.

fields.label: Priority Ranking
fields.help_text: Indicate the priority of this request relative to others submitted by your organization.
fields.rationale: Priority ranking is specific to the submitter's organizational internal planning and cannot be determined from the provided context.

fields.label: Appropriations Subcommittee
fields.help_text: Select the subcommittee with jurisdiction over this request.
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education, and Related Agencies
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: The Science Mission Directorate (SMD) is funded within the NASA account under the jurisdiction of the CJS subcommittee.

fields.label: Agency
fields.help_text: The federal agency associated with the request.
fields.rationale: As specified in the reference values for this programmatic request.

fields.label: Account
fields.help_text: The specific budget account associated with the request.
fields.rationale: Standard budget account name for the Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Proposal Title
fields.help_text: A brief, descriptive title for the proposal.
fields.draft_value: NASA Science Mission Directorate Funding Request
fields.rationale: Matches the short title provided in the strategic context.

fields.label: Proposal Description
fields.help_text: Provide a summary of the request and its intended impact.
fields.draft_value: This request provides $9 billion for NASA's Science Mission Directorate to ensure U.S. leadership in space exploration and support critical research. In VA-05, this funding sustains over $24 million in local activity, supporting institutions like the University of Virginia and companies like Virginia Diodes, Inc. as they develop cutting-edge sensors and radiation testing facilities for space missions.
fields.rationale: Combined the $9B ask with local economic impact data including the $24.6M total and specific recipients like UVA and Virginia Diodes found in the NASA spending context.

fields.label: Is this a program or language request?
fields.help_text: Classify the request as programmatic funding or bill/report language.
fields.rationale: The request is for a specific programmatic funding level of $9 billion for the NASA Science Mission Directorate.

sections.description: Specific information regarding funding amounts or proposed language text.

fields.label: What funding level are you seeking for this program?
fields.help_text: Select the nature of your funding request.
options: Support the FY2027 President's Budget request
fields.rationale: The advocacy ask is for a specific total funding level of $9,000,000,000 for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Please indicate the total funding level.
fields.help_text: Dollar amount for total funding requested.
fields.rationale: Directly uses the Funding Ask amount from the reference values.

fields.label: Please indicate the funding increase amount.
fields.help_text: Dollar amount of the requested increase.
fields.rationale: This reflects the net increase over the FY2026 enacted level of $7.250 billion.

fields.label: Please indicate the funding decrease amount.
fields.help_text: Dollar amount of the requested decrease.
fields.rationale: This is a request for increased funding; no decrease is proposed.

fields.label: Is this request for bill language or report language?
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request, not a language request. This field is likely not applicable based on the selection of 'Program Request'.

fields.label: Please enter your EXACT language request here
fields.help_text: Provide the precise text you are requesting to be included in the bill or report.
fields.draft_value: * $9,000,000,000 for the NASA Science Mission Directorate (SMD) to ensure American leadership in the space race against China and support high-tech manufacturing.
fields.rationale: This draft provides the $9,000,000,000 programmatic funding request for the SMD as specified in the reference values. While the context notes no specific report language is requested (N/A), this text establishes the core funding ask and aligns with strategic priorities such as international competition and domestic manufacturing, relevant to the $24,642,263.92 in recent NASA Science obligations in VA-05 including work at Virginia Diodes, Inc. and the University of Virginia.

fields.label: Do you have any corresponding documents you wish to add, such as executive summaries, one-pagers, reports, etc.?
fields.rationale: The Planetary Society typically provides supplemental advocacy materials, one-pagers, or policy reports to support $9B SMD funding requests.
